title: Rhode Island Hazardous Substances Right-to-Know Act (R.I. Gen. Laws 28-21). Hazardous Substance List (May 2016)

data.CHEMICAL_NAME: Rosin core solder pyrolysis products as Formaldehyde)
Analgesic mixtures containing phenacetin or phenecetin
Butyl peroxyacetate, ter.(75% sol'n in benzene or mineral sp

Aluminum (Dust or Powder),metal & oxide, welding fumes,
